title: Ice Cream DIY Slime Kit for Girls - Butter, Foam, Cloud Slime with Add-ins, Foam Balls, Charms - Party Favors Gift Toys for Kids 6-12
features: ALL in One Slime Kit: The DIY Slime Kit comes in a beautiful box and you can use the Clear Glue and Slime Activator to make any slime you want including Butter Slimes, Crystal Slimes, Cloud Slimes, also come with Candy Sprinkles, Foam balls, Sugar Papers, Fruit Slices, Snow Powder, Scents, Color Inks, Fruit and Dessert Charms, Soft Clay, Container*5, Mixing Bowl, Stirrer and Measuring Cup. So many accessories to make Slime play more fun!

DIY Sweet Treats Making Kit:26-Piece Slime Kit including the amazing mix-ins, Perfect for girls to make their favorite fluffy butter slime and cloud slime creation, and also improve hands-on skills to reduce time spent addicted to electronic devices.

Make Your Own Slime: Our slime making kit will bring endless fun to kids, and inspire your child's unlimited creativity to create a unique Slime, giving full play to children's imagination. Also comes with instructions, making it easy to make and allowing your child to learn while playing!

Perfect Slime Party Favors and Gifts: Suitable for a variety of occasions to give kids gifts and prizes, like Birthday presents, Christmas gifts and classroom prizes. It's always a perfect and attractive gift. This DIY slime kit is educational and meaningful for improving children's hands-on ability, creativity and imagination.
The slime kit is not recommended for children under 3 years of age and must be used under adult supervision.
description: Product Description This dessert slime making kit has everything you need to make the slime, including clear glue (350ML), and slime activator (100ML), containers for storage*5, bowls and stirrers for making the slime, Measuring Cup, Scents*2, and Color ink*4, and includes several decorations for making the desserts, soft clay, and snowflake powder! All in one box for all your dessert-making needs! Want to make the most delicious looking dessert cake ever? try multiple color mixes and multiple accessories and decorations! Package includes Candy Sprinkles, Foam balls, Sugar Papers, Fruit Slices, Snow Powder, Scents, Color Inks, Fruit and Dessert Charms and Soft Clay.Dare to experiment and create with your imagination, you can make the best work! Slimes are perfect for parties and other occasions for kids to share and play with. Kids can compete with friends to see who can make the most beautiful slime, and at the same time, it can enhance children's communication and socialization skills, and improve their friendship. Once finished, slime can be stored in the container for a long time. Tips for making the Crystal Slime: Slime Activator:Put the Slime Activator into the bottle and fill the bottle with water, and then Screw the cap and well mix it. How to Mix:Measure 30ml of the Glue with 8 drops(8ml) of slime activator and stir vigorously for 1 minute. If it's poor molding. Add 2 more drops. Do not add all activator at once, adjust it to the molding situation
